title: Pattaya Visa Help — News & Updates

items.title: TDAC Step by Step — Thailand Digital Arrival Card 2026 Guide
items.content_text: How to fill the Thailand Digital Arrival Card. Step-by-step: passport details, travel info, accommodation, health declaration. Free at tdac.immigration.go.th.

items.title: Thailand 60→30 Day Visa-Exempt Rollback — What We Know
items.content_text: Thailand cabinet reviewing 60→30 day visa-exempt rollback. As of April 2026 still 60 days. Whats announced, when it might change, how to plan.

items.title: Every Thailand Visa Change Going Into 2026 — Recap
items.content_text: TDAC mandatory, 17→7 visa code consolidation, 60→30 day visa-exempt rollback, stricter enforcement. What every traveler and expat needs to know in 2026.
